synthesis.description: Extract structured facts from raw event — slightly elevated temperature to surface implied context beyond verbatim news

impact_evaluation.description: Score impact dimensions and assign severity — grounded scoring with room to reason across ambiguous or low-confidence signals

validation.description: Checklist-style correctness and lineage verification — near-deterministic, no creativity required

retry_policy.note: Fail fast, fail loud — no retries. Failed calls are logged and the pipeline halts.
